apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: cluster3
---
apiVersion: hive.openshift.io/v1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: cluster3
  namespace: cluster3
  labels:
    cloud: AWS
    region: ap-southeast-1
    vendor: OpenShift
    cluster.open-cluster-management.io/clusterset: default
spec:
  boundServiceAccountSigningKeySecretRef:
    name: bound-service-account-signing-key
  baseDomain: aws.sadiqueonline.com
  clusterName: cluster3
  controlPlaneConfig:
    servingCertificates: {}
  installAttemptsLimit: 1
  installed: false
  platform:
    aws:
      credentialsSecretRef:
        name: cluster3-aws-creds
      region: ap-southeast-1
      privateLink:
        enabled: false
  provisioning:
    manifestsSecretRef:
      name: sts-manifests
    installConfigSecretRef:
      name: cluster3-install-config
    sshPrivateKeySecretRef:
      name: cluster3-ssh-private-key
    imageSetRef:
      name: openshift-4-20-13
  pullSecretRef:
    name: cluster3-pull-secret
---
apiVersion: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1
kind: ManagedCluster
metadata:
  name: cluster3
  labels:
    name: cluster3
    cloud: Amazon
    region: ap-southeast-1
    vendor: OpenShift
    cluster.open-cluster-management.io/clusterset: default
spec:
  hubAcceptsClient: true
---
apiVersion: hive.openshift.io/v1
kind: MachinePool
metadata:
  name: cluster3-worker
  namespace: cluster3
spec:
  name: worker
  clusterDeploymentRef:
    name: cluster3
  platform:
    aws:
      zones:
        - ap-southeast-1a
        - ap-southeast-1b
        - ap-southeast-1c
      rootVolume:
        iops: 2000
        size: 100
        type: io1
      type: m5.xlarge
  replicas: 3
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cluster3-pull-secret
  namespace: cluster3
stringData:
  .dockerconfigjson: |
    {
      "auths": {
        "registry url:8443": {
          "auth": "base64 encoded username:password"
        }
      }
    }
type: kubernetes.io/dockerconfigjson
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cluster3-install-config
  namespace: cluster3
type: Opaque
data:
  install-config.yaml: >-
    
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cluster3-ssh-private-key
  namespace: cluster3
stringData:
  ssh-privatekey:
type: Opaque
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
type: Opaque
metadata:
  name: cluster3-aws-creds
  namespace: cluster3
stringData:
  aws_access_key_id: <aws_access_key_id>
  aws_secret_access_key: <aws_secret_access_key>
---
apiVersion: agent.open-cluster-management.io/v1
kind: KlusterletAddonConfig
metadata:
  name: cluster3
  namespace: cluster3
spec:
  clusterName: cluster3
  clusterNamespace: cluster3
  clusterLabels:
    cloud: Amazon
    vendor: OpenShift
  applicationManager:
    proxyPolicy: OCPGlobalProxy
    enabled: true
  policyController:
    proxyPolicy: OCPGlobalProxy
    enabled: true
  searchCollector:
    proxyPolicy: OCPGlobalProxy
    enabled: true
  certPolicyController:
    proxyPolicy: OCPGlobalProxy
    enabled: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bound-service-account-signing-key
  namespace: cluster3
type: Opaque
data:
  bound-service-account-signing-key.key: base64 encoded private key 
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: sts-manifests
  namespace: cluster3
data:
  cluster-authentication-02-config.yaml: YXBpVmVyc2lvbjogY29uZmlnLm9wZW5zaGlmdC5pby92MQpraW5kOiBBdXRoZW50aWNhdGlvbgptZXRhZGF0YToKICBuYW1lOiBjbHVzdGVyCnNwZWM6CiAgc2VydmljZUFjY291bnRJc3N1ZXI6IGh0dHBzOi8vZDM3OHAzM2h2bmZ2M2ouY2xvdWRmcm9udC5uZXQ=
  openshift-cloud-credential-operator-cloud-credential-operator-iam-ro-creds-credentials.yaml: 
  openshift-cloud-network-config-controller-cloud-credentials-credentials.yaml: 
  openshift-cluster-csi-drivers-ebs-cloud-credentials-credentials.yaml: 
  openshift-image-registry-installer-cloud-credentials-credentials.yaml: 
  openshift-ingress-operator-cloud-credentials-credentials.yaml: 
  openshift-machine-api-aws-cloud-credentials-credentials.yaml:
